items.title: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
items.summary: Of all the debates raging about the potential downsides of AI, there is one worry causing the most hand-wringing among AI enthusiasts in Silicon Valley — that the giant AI labs that sell proprietary models are somehow acting like Trojan horses.

items.title: The Shokz OpenRun Pro are the cheapest they’ve been since January
items.summary: Noise-canceling earbuds are great for flights and focusing, but they're not always ideal for outdoor workouts. The last-gen Shokz OpenRun Pro's open-ear design lets you enjoy music while staying aware of approaching cars, cyclists, and other potential hazards, and right now they're on sale for $109 ($50 off) at Amazon, Walmart, and B&H Photo. That […]

items.title: The Pixel colors might rule this year
items.summary: This year's Google Pixel 11 lineup might come in a bunch of funky colors. A series of now-deleted Amazon listings spotted by 9to5Google show what appear to be placeholders for Google's upcoming Pixel 11 in hot pink Fuchsia (Hibiscus), vibrant green Moss (Pistachio), and Midnight (Obsidian) black. We've seen two sets of names for the […]

items.title: Apple’s public betas for iOS 27 and more are out now
items.summary: Apple has just released public betas for iOS 27 and other major OS updates that are set to publicly launch this fall. The big new feature this year is Siri AI, the delayed AI-powered revamp to Siri. It actually works - which is big praise! - though it keeps things brief. Other betas available now […]

items.title: Siri AI makes the Apple Watch finally feel like a wrist computer
items.summary: Siri has been on the Apple Watch since day one, though I'm usually hard-pressed to find people who actually make good use of it. It's kind of just… been there - mostly as a way to set timers when my hands are full. But after playing around with the watchOS 27 developer beta, I get […]

items.title: Ukrainian drone strikes forced Russia to stop shipping in vital sea corridor
items.summary: Ukraine’s drone blitz halted Russia’s Sea of Azov shipping in under a week.

items.title: Hungary parliament votes to remove president from office
items.summary: Tamás Sulyok was widely seen as a loyalist of former prime minister Viktor Orbán, who lost power in April after 16 years.

items.title: Monday’s Apple Books and audiobook deals from $1
items.summary: Today’s lineup of the best Apple Books deals is now, including titles like The Summer Sail, The Wife, Hollywood Wives, The Coincidence of Coconut Cake, The Summer’s End, The McBain Brief, Christopher’s Ghosts, and more. We also have Amazon’s latest price drop on AirPods Pro 3 if you’re looking to enhance your audiobook experience, but all of the book deals await below.

items.title: Elevate your outdoor gatherings in summer and beyond with East Oak’s 21-inch Camber smokeless fire pit at $200 ($70 off)
items.summary: Amazon is offering the chance to update your summer gatherings with the East Oak 21-inch Camber Smokeless Portable Fire Pit down at $199.98 shipped right now. Normally you’d be paying $270 for this model at full price, which we’ve seen discounted between $255 and $180 in 2026. If you missed out on Prime Day last month, which is when we last saw the annual low appear, you’re getting the next-best price for the last 12 months here with $70 savings. There’s also the cheaper option of the smaller 17-inch Camber Fire Pit down at $139.99 shipped from its $210 full price.

items.title: Wildfire raging south of Paris could have been set deliberately, says minister
items.summary: The interior minister has said the fire near Paris could have been set deliberately and two people have been arrested.

items.title: Rare 20% price drops hit Nomad’s gorgeous metal/glass 25W Qi2 MagSafe stands today
items.summary: There are far more affordable 25W Qi2 MagSafe charging stands out there, but there are almost none quite as premium and gorgeous as the latest Nomad models. They are not cheap, but with the brand’s 2026 Anniversary Sale now live we are now tracking rare price drops on both the 2-in-1 and 3-in-1 models for your entire Apple EDC.

items.title: Apple says former employee exploited ‘rare’ bug to download confidential files after leaving for OpenAI
items.summary: Apple would not comment on the "security breach," which allegedly allowed a former employee to download sensitive files from Apple's network long after he departed the company for rival OpenAI.

items.title: California creates $3,500 rebate for new electric vehicle buyers
items.summary: There's a separate $1,750 rebate for used EVs, but both rebates have a price cap.

items.title: Get compact support from the 288Wh Bluetti Elite 30 V2 portable power station while down at $219
items.summary: Through its official Amazon storefront, Bluetti is offering the Elite 30 V2 Portable Power Station in a bunch of colorways starting from $219 shipped, which beats out the direct website by $8, and that’s when using our exclusive code 9TO5TOYS5OFF at checkout, too. While it used to hold a $299 MSRP, it’s been starting lower at $239 since May, when the brand permanently cut prices across its lineup to better match market rates. We’ve mostly seen discounts dropping the cost to this rate both before and after May’s price cuts, though there were slight dips lower to $204 in January and $199 during last month’s Prime Day event. If you missed your chance last month, you’re getting the next-best rate we have tracked since May’s price cuts. Be sure to also check out the Bluetti Summer Power Sale lineup of exclusive deals while it lasts for only a few more days.

items.title: Burton Goods debuts new hybrid leather iPadfolio meets notebook for serious pros [Exclusive deal]
items.summary: Last time we checked in with the team of artisan accessory makers at Burton Goods we featured an exclusive deal on its new stainless steel Apple Watch Ocean Band-style bracelet. But today, the brand is unleashing its all new Leather Padfolio with iPad sleeve and we have an exclusive launch deal on that for you as well.

items.title: Save up to 40% on stylish watches from Citizen, Casio, Timex, and more with deals from $23
items.summary: Amazon is making it easy to upgrade your accessory collection right now with a wide selection of brand-name watches on sale. You can find discounts of up to 40% off on quality styles from popular brands like Guess, Boss, Timex, Casio, Diesel, Citizen, and more.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI after ex-engineer allegedly used bug to steal trade secrets
items.summary: OpenAI accused of conspiring with former Apple employees to steal trade secrets.

items.title: Solution to Feynman's reverse sprinkler puzzle also applies to "silly sprinklers"
items.summary: New study confirms 2024 "momentum flux theory" on how angular momentum of water flows drives rotation.

items.title: Nomad’s giant sitewide Anniversary sale now live: Rare deals on MagSafe chargers, cases, Watch bands, more
items.summary: Nomad has just launched one of its biggest sales events of the year, with deals spanning its range of iPhone 17 leather cases, Apple Watch bands, cables, Find My Tracking Card (we were told this was going on sale today, but it is yet to go live), its gorgeous Stand One Max 3-in-1 25W MagSafe Charger, wallets, and more. Alongside all of the deals in its Overstock Sale section, you’re looking at up to 30% off some of its latest-generation gear and a host of rare price drops here on the official site.

items.title: US judge voids Donald Trump's $1.8bn settlement with IRS that gave him immunity from tax audits
items.summary: The judge said the suit was brought for 'improper purposes' and referred a Trump attorney for possible disciplinary action.

items.title: Stop putting your apps on layaway with 78% off Microsoft Office Pro Plus at $55 ($250 value)

items.title: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
items.summary: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI contains allegations that range from employees joking about unauthorized access to Apple’s systems to claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple hardware to interviews. Here are the complaint’s most eye-catching claims.

items.title: Go quick! Official Nintendo Switch 2 Camera now just $10 at GameStop (Reg. $55)
items.summary:
Update 6/12: While the Amazon deal below is still live when added to your cart, GameStop just dropped the price on the official Nintendo Switch 2 Camera down to a crazy $9.99 – this likely won’t last for long. 

The official Nintendo Switch 2 Camera is now sitting down at a rare Amazon all-time low with over 42% in savings.

items.title: Save $526 today on Samsung’s Odyssey 27-inch 4K 240Hz QD-OLED gaming monitor while it’s down to $774 all-time low
items.summary: As part of its wider sale on monitors, Woot is now offering Samsung’s 2025 27-inch Odyssey OLED G8 (G81SF) 4K 240Hz gaming monitor for $773.99 Prime shipped. This is regularly a $1,300 display, which is currently fetching $850 at Amazon. Today’s offer at Woot, however, takes an additional $76 off. This 40% discount marks the lowest price we have tracked for this 4K UHD monitor, landing $26 below its previous all-time low.
